# Review CHANGES REQUESTED for PAN-1549

# Review Synthesis â€” PAN-1549 â€” 2026-05-28T22:35:00Z

## Verdict: CHANGES REQUESTED

## Context
- Manifest: /home/eltmon/Projects/panopticon-cli/workspaces/feature-pan-1549/.pan/review/agent-pan-1549-review-cfb0283b/context.json
- Branch: feature/pan-1549
- Workspace: /home/eltmon/Projects/panopticon-cli/workspaces/feature-pan-1549
- HEAD reviewed: cfb0283b898ffbd67181ace82b1d1a656bb1d4af
- Cycle number: 4
- Prior cycle SHA: 603f209f031457abdd3c734ab6d181a077347c45

## Convoy Status
| Sub-role | Signal | Output | Blocking findings |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| security | ready | security.md | 0 |
| correctness | ready | correctness.md | 1 |
| performance | ready | performance.md | 0 |
| requirements | ready | requirements.md | 0 |

## Blocking Findings

### [correctness] `onCreateConversation` handler discards `agentId`, breaking agent-specific conversation creation â€” `src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/Stage/index.tsx:146` + `src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/CommandDeck/index.tsx:1220`
`onAgentSelected` in `Stage/index.tsx` passes the chosen agent id to `onCreateConversation?.(id)`, but the `CommandDeck` mount wraps the handler as `() => handleNewConversation()` which ignores the argument. `handleNewConversation` â†’ `createConversationForProject()` creates a conversation with `sidebarModel`/`sidebarHarness` rather than the selected agent, then clears `selectedFeature` and shows the global `ConversationPanel`. The user never lands in a Stage agent pane. This breaks the acceptance criterion that agent-specific launcher/dock clicks create a conversation and open an agent pane focused on it. The `onAgentSelected` callback was introduced in this cycle diff, so this is a new broken integration contract.

## Non-blocking Findings

### [correctness] `Timeline` date-group keys can collide across years â€” `src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/Stage/HomePane/Timeline.tsx:33`
`dateGroupLabel` returns `"May 28"` for any year; two conversations from May 28 of different years produce the same React `key`, violating key uniqueness and causing potential stale DOM. Fix: include year or a timestamp in the key, e.g. `` `${group.label}-${group.items[0]?.timestamp}` ``.

### [correctness] `FilesPane` stacks duplicate Commits panes â€” `src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/Stage/panes/FilesPane.tsx:41`
Every file click calls `openPane({ paneType: 'commits', label: 'Commits' })` without checking whether a Commits pane already exists. Clicking multiple files opens multiple identical Commits panes. Fix: check for an existing `paneType === 'commits'` pane and focus it before adding a new one.

### [correctness] `useStageShortcuts` does not suppress Shift+Meta combinations â€” `src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/Stage/useStageShortcuts.ts:27` [demoted: previously reviewed]
`e.shiftKey` is not checked; `âŒ˜â‡§1`â€“`âŒ˜â‡§9` incorrectly trigger pane switching because `/^[1-9]$/` matches even when Shift is held. This file was not changed in the cycle diff and was reviewed in a prior cycle.

### [correctness] `AgentPane` session branch is unreachable dead code â€” `src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/Stage/panes/AgentPane.tsx:20-23` [demoted: previously reviewed]
The `SessionPanel` branch is tested but `resolveAgentPane` never returns a `session` object. This file was not changed in the cycle diff.

### [correctness] Missing `beforeunload` flush for debounced persistence â€” `src/dashboard/frontend/src/lib/panesStore.ts` [demoted: previously reviewed]
`panesStore.ts` coalesces localStorage writes via `setTimeout(..., 0)`. A page close in the same tick as a pane mutation could drop the write. Risk is negligible in practice (0 ms timeout). This file was not changed in the cycle diff.

### [performance] `PaneBar` tab click handlers recreated every render â€” `src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/Stage/PaneBar.tsx:46`
Inline `onClick={() => onSelect(pane.paneId)}` and `onKeyDown` lambdas are recreated per tab on every `Stage` re-render. Negligible at typical pane counts (< 10). Consider wrapping `PaneBar` in `React.memo` or extracting a memoized `PaneTab` sub-component if pane counts grow significantly.

### [performance] `DocsPane` unconditionally fetches full planning data on mount â€” `src/dashboard/frontend/src/components/Stage/panes/DocsPane.tsx:26-27` [demoted: previously reviewed]
`usePlanningQuery(issueId)` runs regardless of which doc tab is active. React Query caches the result, so switching between PRD/STATE/INFERENCE tabs inside the pane is instant. This file was not changed in the cycle diff.

### [requirements] Review notes in vBRIEF metadata may be stale
The vBRIEF `review.notes` field records three items (timeline NaN rendering, synchronous localStorage writes, unbounded workspace state growth) that were all addressed in commit `dca029ce6`. The notes no longer reflect the current code state.

## Clean Sub-roles
- security

Source: /home/eltmon/Projects/panopticon-cli/workspaces/feature-pan-1549/.pan/review/agent-pan-1549-review-cfb0283b/synthesis.md

## Required action

Fix every blocking review finding, commit the fixes, then re-request review with:

`pan review request PAN-1549 -m "Fixed review issues"`
